title: Glass Vase for Flower Tall Cylinder Clear Flower Vase (10x30cm)
features: Glass flower vase - perfect art decoration for your kitchen, dining room and living room and office. A great gift for Christmas, Thanksgiving, home warming, wedding and birthday.
High quality: the vases are made of high quality glass, smooth surface and edge.
The glass cylindrical vase can be used for flowers, hydroponic plants and candles.

Package: 1x vase. CUSTOMER SERVICE: Please note that the glass vase is fragile product but we will try our best to ensure the integrity of the butter dish during transportation. If you receive a broken product unfortunately, please protect yourself from broken glass and contact customer service immediately for after-sales help.
description: Product Description Product Details Wide Mouth Size: 10x10x30cm; 10x10x20cm; 10x10x10cm. The vase is designed with smooth and wide mouth, suitable for placing 10-15 roses. 3 sizes to choose from, suitable for flowers and plants of different heights. High Transparency The vase is made of high transparency glass, crystal clear, useful vase for flowers and hydroponic plants. Thick Base The base of the vase is very thick, stable to place large and tall bouquet of flowers. Simple design, crystal clear body, perfectly compatible with various decoration styles.
